test_bugs.description: TimeoutError on Locator.fill — Stripe Elements renders card number, expiry, and CVC in separate iframes. The test attempts to fill them as plain inputs, which fails. Test needs a complete redesign to switch into each iframe before filling.
Same Stripe Elements iframe issue as test_8_1 — test design cannot reach card fields without switching iframe context.

missing_data.reason: Requires seeded booking data — seed_test_data blocked by sudo password
Requires seeded booking detail — seed blocked

notes: Zero real_bug failures this cycle. All three previously known real bugs are now resolved: test_17_4 (wallet add funds link), test_19_2 (billing admin-tool 500→403), test_21_phone (dashboard overflow). Stripe tests are test_bugs requiring iframe redesign. Skips are missing_data blocked by seed infrastructure.
